sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; function FreelancerProfile() { const freelancer = { name: "Rahul Patil", title: "Full Stack Web Developer", location: "Nashik, Maharashtra", hourlyRate: "₹800 / hr", about: "I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience in building modern web applications. Specializing in React, Node.js, and UI/UX design, I help clients turn ideas into successful digital products.", skills: ["React.js", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Tailwind CSS", "Figma", "JavaScript", "Python"], experience: [ { year: "2023 - Present", role: "Senior Freelancer", company: "Upwork / Global Clients" }, { year: "2022 - 2023", role: "Web Intern", company: "Tech Nashik Solutions" } ], projects: [ { name: "E-commerce Platform", desc: "A full-featured online store with payment integration.", tech: "MERN Stack" }, { name: "SaaS Dashboard", desc: "Real-time analytics dashboard for business management.", tech: "React & Firebase" } ] }; return (
{/* 1. Header Gradient Background */}
{/* LEFT SIDE: Profile Card */}

{freelancer.name}

{freelancer.title}

📍 {freelancer.location}

15+
Projects
4.9/5
Rating
{/* RIGHT SIDE: Details & Content */}
{/* About Me */}

Professional Bio

{freelancer.about}

Expected Rate: {freelancer.hourlyRate}
{/* Skills Badges */}

Core Skills

{freelancer.skills.map((skill, index) => ( {skill} ))}
{/* Featured Projects */}

Featured Projects

{freelancer.projects.map((project, index) => (
{project.name}

{project.desc}

{project.tech}
))}
{/* Experience Timeline */}

Work Experience

{freelancer.experience.map((exp, index) => (
{exp.year}
{exp.role}

{exp.company}

))}
); } export default FreelancerProfile;
